header.title: Analytics
header.description: Close the loop on Atmosphere releases by defining success metrics, instrumenting experiences, and sharing results.

sections.title: Define what success looks like
sections.description: Align designers, researchers, and product leads on the outcomes you expect from new work before it ships.

sections.title: Instrument the experience
sections.description: Collaborate with engineering to capture events, log accessibility checks, and share dashboards with stakeholders.

sections.title: Report and iterate
sections.description: Tell the story of what changed, publish learnings, and prioritize the next release based on evidence.
